EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ICompositeGeoTransformation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control a set of geographic transformations.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3BE52788-DDA4-11D3-9F61-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface ICompositeGeoTransformation : IGeoTransformation, ITransformation

Properties

Count

The number of geographic transformations in the list.

int Count { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeoTransformation[int]

A geographic transformation from the list.

IGeoTransformation GeoTransformation[int i] { get; }

Parameters

i int

Property Value

IGeoTransformation

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name 

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TransformationDirection[int]

The direction (forward/reverse) of a geographic transformation.

esriTransformDirection TransformationDirection[int i] { get; }

Parameters

i int

Property Value

esriTransformDirection
